name: Gf Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. This is a special recipe made without gluten.
2. Sift dry ingredients together.
3. Beat the sugars and margarine until well combined.
4. Add the egg and beat again.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients.
7. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
8. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
9. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
